steps.name: Enrichment domain types and UEI validation
steps.description: Pure domain value objects: EnrichedField, FieldSource, EnrichmentResult, SourceError, CompanyCandidate. UEI format validation (12 alphanumeric). Field-to-schema mapping constants. No I/O imports.
criteria: Given a 12-character alphanumeric UEI, when validated, then it is accepted
Given a UEI with invalid length or non-alphanumeric chars, when validated, then it is rejected with a descriptive message
Given enriched fields from multiple sources, when assembled into EnrichmentResult, then each field retains its source attribution
Given an EnrichmentResult and a profile schema, when missing fields computed, then only unpopulated required fields are listed

steps.name: API key port, adapter, and validation
steps.description: ApiKeyPort abstract interface. JsonApiKeyAdapter reads/writes ~/.sbir/api-keys.json. Key validation via SAM.gov test endpoint. Key passed via stdin for save, never as CLI arg.
criteria: Given an existing api-keys.json with a SAM.gov key, when read_key called, then the key is returned
Given no api-keys.json file, when read_key called, then None returned without error
Given a malformed api-keys.json, when read_key called, then a clear error is returned without crash
Given a valid key, when saved, then file written with owner-only permissions
Given a key value, when the CLI save-key mode is used, then the key is read from stdin and never appears in process arguments

steps.name: SAM.gov Entity API adapter
steps.description: Implements EnrichmentSourcePort for SAM.gov Entity API v3. Maps entity registration fields to EnrichedField objects. Business type code-to-certification mapping. Timeout and error handling.
criteria: Given a valid UEI and API key, when SAM.gov returns entity data, then legal name, CAGE code, NAICS codes, certifications, and registration status are mapped to EnrichedField objects
Given a UEI with no matching entity, when SAM.gov returns empty results, then a not-found indicator is returned with no fields
Given a network timeout, when the adapter call fails, then a SourceError with type 'timeout' is returned and no exception propagates
Given business type codes in the response, when mapped, then codes like A8, QF, A5 produce human-readable certification names

steps.name: SBIR.gov Company and Awards API adapter
steps.description: Implements EnrichmentSourcePort for SBIR.gov. Company name search with disambiguation support. Award history fetch with agency, topic, and phase mapping. Parallel development with 02-01; runtime cascade ordering (SAM.gov name resolution) is handled in 03-01 service layer.
criteria: Given a company name matching one SBIR.gov firm, when fetched, then award history returned as EnrichedField objects with per-award agency and phase
Given a company name matching multiple firms, when fetched, then CompanyCandidate list returned for caller disambiguation
Given a timeout on SBIR.gov, when the adapter call fails, then a SourceError is returned without blocking other adapters
Given award data, when mapped, then each award includes agency, topic area, and phase

steps.name: USASpending.gov recipient API adapter
steps.description: Implements EnrichmentSourcePort for USASpending.gov. Two-step resolution: POST autocomplete by company name, GET recipient detail by ID. Returns total awards and business types. Parallel development with 02-01; runtime cascade ordering is handled in 03-01 service layer.
criteria: Given a company name, when autocomplete resolves a recipient, then total award amount and transaction count are returned as EnrichedField objects
Given a company name with no autocomplete match, when fetched, then empty result returned with not-found indicator
Given a timeout on either the autocomplete or recipient detail step, when the adapter call fails, then a SourceError is returned gracefully
Given business types in the response, when returned, then they are available for cross-check against SAM.gov certifications

steps.name: Company enrichment service with partial failure handling
steps.description: Orchestrates three-API cascade: SAM.gov first (provides company name), then SBIR.gov and USASpending in parallel. Merges results into single EnrichmentResult. Tracks per-source success/failure.
criteria: Given all three APIs succeed, when enrichment runs, then a merged EnrichmentResult contains fields from all three sources
Given SBIR.gov fails but SAM.gov and USASpending succeed, when enrichment runs, then partial result returned with SBIR.gov in errors list
Given SAM.gov fails, when enrichment runs, then SBIR.gov and USASpending are skipped (name dependency) and all three marked in errors
Given a completed enrichment, when missing fields computed, then the list reflects schema required fields minus populated fields

steps.name: Profile diff logic for re-enrichment
steps.description: Pure domain logic comparing EnrichmentResult against existing profile JSON. Detects additions, changes, and matches. Order-independent array comparison for NAICS codes and past performance. Outputs ProfileDiff value object for agent to interpret and display.
criteria: Given a new NAICS code in enrichment not in existing profile, when diffed, then it appears as an addition
Given a new SBIR award in enrichment not in existing profile, when diffed, then it appears as an addition
Given NAICS codes in different order but same values, when diffed, then no change is flagged
Given user-entered fields not present in API responses, when diffed, then they appear in api_missing and are preserved
Given enrichment matching all existing profile fields, when diffed, then result indicates no changes

steps.name: Enrichment CLI entry point
steps.description: CLI at scripts/pes/enrichment_cli.py with modes: enrich, diff, validate-key, save-key. Composition root wiring adapters to service. JSON stdout output. Structured error responses.
criteria: Given mode 'enrich' and a valid UEI, when invoked, then EnrichmentResult JSON is written to stdout
Given mode 'diff' with UEI and profile path, when invoked, then ProfileDiff JSON is written to stdout
Given mode 'validate-key', when invoked, then JSON with valid/invalid status is written to stdout
Given mode 'save-key' with key on stdin, when invoked, then key is saved and confirmation JSON is written to stdout
Given any error condition, when invoked, then structured JSON error is written to stdout (no stack traces)

steps.name: Schema extension and agent enrichment phase
steps.description: Add naics_codes array and registration_expiration to profile schema. Update profile builder agent with ENRICHMENT phase. Create enrichment-domain skill. Agent invokes CLI, displays results with source attribution, collects confirmations.
criteria: Given a profile with naics_codes populated, when validated against schema, then validation passes
Given a SAM.gov API key is available, when profile builder starts, then enrichment is offered to the user
Given the user declines enrichment, when profile builder continues, then the existing manual interview flow runs unchanged
Given enriched fields displayed to user, when each field shown, then its source API is visible
Given the user confirms selected fields, when merged, then only confirmed fields enter the profile draft
Given a re-enrichment during profile update, when diff shown, then per-field accept/reject is available
